task: Build the Flwntier ChiefApp — Android tarot drawer in iching-oracle's visual language, data path through Flwntier runtime
summary:
Chairman: '现在我需要你让 Flwntier 跑一下安卓的塔罗牌,前端要完全一致,抽卡也要图片'.

What this event delivers:

* RUNTIME SIDE (crates/pipe-server/src/tarot.rs, new):
  - 78-card Rider-Waite deck baked into the binary (22 Major
    Arcana + 56 Minor across Wands/Cups/Swords/Pentacles).
  - Each card carries: id, arcana, suit, rank, name_zh,
    name_pinyin, name_en, symbol_svg (100x140 inline SVG),
    upright_meaning, reversed_meaning (single-sentence
    Chinese poetic interpretation, what the chairman
    wanted).
  - draw_one() picks a card uniformly at random; per-card
    draw_reversed() flips a 50/50 toggle for upright vs
    reversed (mirrors the chairman's tarot tradition).
  - draw_three_card_spread() returns past/present/future.
  - Inline SVGs are hand-drawn (lines + circles + simple
    paths). 1-2 KB each. Render to a single teal stroke
    on the chief app side (the chairman's墨纸 teal
    palette is the only colour that matters).
  - Three new routes on the pipe-server:
      GET /api/tarot/draw           → single card
      GET /api/tarot/draw?spread=3  → past/present/future
      GET /api/tarot/list           → 78-card deck metadata

* ANDROID SIDE (apps/ChiefApp/, new project):
  - Same Kotlin + Compose + Material3 + 墨纸 teal palette as
    IChingOracle (event 000073 boundary: 'iching-oracle
    tech stack is the visual language for telling the
    Flwntier chief what to build').
  - data/RuntimeClient.kt: OkHttp JSON-RPC 2.0 client to
    /api/tarot/draw + /list. Three call sites:
    drawOne() / drawThree() / listDeck().
  - TarotViewModel.kt: Initial / Drawing / Loaded / Error
    state machine (same shape as IChingViewModel). 3.1s
    draw animation (matches iching-oracle's 3.1s budget).
  - ui/oracle/TarotScreen.kt:
      * Home page: 78-card name cloud drifts in the
        background (loop-driven infinite transition),
        '塔罗' title, 'Flowntier · 心诚则灵' subtitle,
        '点击抽取' primary + '三卡阵 · 过去/现在/未来'
        secondary.
      * Drawing view: per-card scale-in + 360° Y-axis
        rotation over 1.5s (CardFlip helper).
      * Loaded view: single card or 3-card spread, with
        upright/reversed indicator + poetic
        interpretation text. '再抽一张' + '三卡阵' +
        '返回首页' buttons.
      * SVG rendering: hand-rolled Android Canvas path
        painter (path/circle/rect from the runtime's
        inline SVGs). No external dep — keeps the APK
        small. v0.2 can swap in AndroidSVG / Coil-SVG for
        richer rendering if the chairman wants it.
  - Launcher icon: tarot-card outline + 5-pointed star,
    teal background, white foreground. Visual cousin to
    IChingOracle's adaptive icon (same teal #00897B).

* VERIFIED:
  - Gradle build: `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug` →
    BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 14s, app-debug.apk = 13,772,503
    bytes.
  - Runtime smoke test (curl):
      * GET /api/tarot/draw → 1 card, 'The Lovers' reversed.
      * GET /api/tarot/draw?spread=3 → '恋人/月亮/圣杯·二'.
      * GET /api/tarot/list → count 78 (0..77).
  - APK copied to C:/Users/thatg/Desktop/
    ChiefApp-tarot-v0.1.0-debug.apk for the chairman to
    install on a real device / emulator.
  - Not verified: emulator not installed at O:/Android-sdk/
    (no emulator/emulator.exe). The chairman will need to
    install the APK on a real device or set up an AVD.

* BOUNDARY (NWT 000073 holds):
  - ChiefApp is NOT a Flwntier GitHub release product.
  - The 78-card deck and the runtime's /api/tarot/* routes
    ARE part of the Flwntier product (the runtime serves
    them to any client — the Android chief app, a future
    iOS client, a web client, curl, etc.).
  - 塔罗牌 is the chairman's own end-to-end smoke test.
    The chief app is a Flwntier product surface that
    happens to use the chairman's视觉语言 for its UI.

* FILES TOUCHED:
  - crates/pipe-server/src/tarot.rs  (new, ~520 lines)
  - crates/pipe-server/src/lib.rs  (added 'pub mod tarot')
  - crates/pipe-server/src/handlers.rs  (3 new routes)
  - apps/ChiefApp/  (new project, 13 files)
  - .nwt/timeline/000074.json  (this file)
reason: Chairman: '现在我需要你让 Flwntier 跑一下安卓的塔罗牌,前端要完全一致,抽卡也要图片'. Visual parity with IChingOracle (event 000073 boundary: 'iching-oracle tech stack is the visual language'); functional parity with the Flwntier runtime (data path runs through /api/tarot/draw, not a local 64-gua JSON).
